title: Intern(Marketing)
description:
Marketing Intern (Events & Activations)

Sales events

  • Assist in the planning and executionof sales-led events
  • Support event set-up, logisticscoordination, including venue coordination, assets, timelines, and tear-down
  • Liaise with internal and external partnersto ensure event requirements are met
  • Assist with on-ground event supportto ensure smooth operations
  • Supportcontent capture during events for social media and marketing use
  • Support post-event reporting andlearnings

Concept corners

  • Assist in conceptualising anddeveloping visually impactful in-store display
  • Provide support for trade marketinginitiatives to enhance store visibility and exposure
  • Coordinate with designers, vendorsand operations teams for display execution
  • Conductcompetitor analysis to understand the retail and showroom landscape

Showrooms

  • Assist in developing ideas and strategies to boost traffic to showrooms
  • Help plan and execute social media or digital touchpoints that drive showroom visits

General support

  •  Assist the marketing team with day-to-day operational and administrative tasks
  •  Any other ad-hoc marketing duties as required

Measurements of success:

Sales & Marketing Events:

  • Event set-up and tear-down completed on timeLogistics checklist completedaccurately (assets, vendors, manpower, timelines)
  • Fewer last-minute escalations orerrors over time
  • Positive feedback frommarketing/sales team after events
  • Completeness and usability of eventcontent captured (photos/videos usable for socials)

Concept Corners:

  • Timelycoordination with designers/vendors for display roll-out
  • Qualityof competitor analysis – relevant & insightful

Showroom:

  • Number of activation ideas proposed(even if not all are executed)
  • Contribution to digital/social touchpoints driving visits
  • Number of appointment booking increases


Attitude, Learning & Professionalism:

  • Understands basic brand guidelines
  • Takes feedback positively and improves
  • Shows initiative beyond assigned tasks
  • Demonstrates ownership and responsibility
  • Punctual, dependable, and professional on-site


Mon-Fri, 8.45am to 5.30pm

postedCompany.description: Exclusively distributed by Capital Marketing, Bertazzoni is a 130-year-old family-owned company that manufactures ovens, cooktops and ventilation systems. Embracing a strong heritage of fine engineering and the culinary culture of the Emilia Romagna Region, Bertazzoni products are built with passion and precision by people who know about cooking, for people around the world who love to cook.
postedCompany.name: CAPITAL MARKETING (S) PTE LTD
